## Source: ghsa-malware (604d240f2c806eb77a54a7411234db0fbec6813661b397aa685ea8b8bbe663bf)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8d4a98f58930eb7f736a5c69a6cf5de5b6dd033785255d4d55ae1da5a5866629)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-loops-core' @ 1.0.2 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
